suite.name: suite S1779727684194 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Wrong Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Invalid Password Error
Verify Invalid Password Error Is Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Wrong Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Invalid Username Error
Verify Invalid Username Error Is Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' contains text 'Your username is invalid!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Logout Confirmation Message
Verify Logout Message Is Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' should have contained text 'You logged out of the secure area!' but its text was 'You logged into a secure area! ×'.
kw.arg: You logged out of the secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
kw.status: Element 'id=flash' should have contained text 'You logged out of the secure area!' but its text was 'You logged into a secure area! ×'.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.status: Element 'id=flash' should have contained text 'You logged out of the secure area!' but its text was 'You logged into a secure area! ×'.
Element 'id=flash' should have contained text 'You logged out of the secure area!' but its text was 'You logged into a secure area! ×'.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'id=flash' should have contained text 'You logged out of the secure area!' but its text was 'You logged into a secure area! ×'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Tests for Login functionality on The Internet
